setup.heading: Spotify setup
setup.description: To connect to Spotify, you must set up a personal Spotify Developer app. An active Spotify Premium subscription is required.
setup.step1: Visit developer.spotify.com and log in with your Spotify account
setup.step2: Click your name in the top right, and then click Dashboard
setup.step3: Review the terms, and on the dashboard click Create app
setup.step4: Enter a name and description for your app
setup.step5: Paste the following into the Redirect URIs field and click Add:
setup.step6: Click Save at the bottom of the page
setup.clientIdLabel: Your app will have a Client ID listed under Basic Information. Paste it into the following field to continue:

errorDialog.premiumRequiredMessage: Your Spotify account does not have an active Spotify Premium subscription. Spotify Premium is required for playback of tracks from Spotify within the app.
errorDialog.profileErrorMessage: The profile information for this Spotify account couldn't be obtained. You may need to ensure that your Spotify account has access to the application.

librarySetup.heading: Configure your Spotify library
librarySetup.description: Choose which songs from Spotify you'd like to include in your library. You can change this later in Settings.
